title: わたしね、1着とっちゃうよ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tracen Meet is fast approaching. It's one of the Academy's
regular events, and it features every category of race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As such, the training grounds are filled with students practicing, eager
to show off their skills on the day of the event.
Huff, puff... A-almost... there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them, I see an exhausted Umamusume straggling far behind
the others.
Fiiinish... Wheeze. Urgh... So dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When her body finally gives out and she falls to the ground, I rush to
her side.
Y-yup, all good...

Phew... Can't let a little dizziness get in my way, especially if I want to
win!
But thanks for checking on me! Um... Are you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In answer to her inquisitive look, I quickly introduce myself as a
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa, a trainer, huh?! Nice to meet you! I'm Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, that means you're coming to the Tracen Meet, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Then make sure you watch my race too! I'm going to take first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Running feels really good! And look at all this energy! Not to mention
how tasty carrots are! I bet I've got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Haru Urara beams with confidence, I think back to how she pushed
herself to the point of collapse during training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Perhaps she's more talented than my first impression?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I better get back to training! See you at the race! Bye-bye!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Why are my legs so heeeavy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With a strained cry, Haru Urara dashes off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the event, curious to see Haru Urara's performance, I
make my way to her assigned racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've entered the final stretch! Haru Urara continues to lag farther
and farther behind the pack!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! I'm not giving up yet!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And across the line! What a close race! We've got a photo finish on
our hands!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as every other runner passes the finish line, Haru Urara continues
to run with all her might, eyes fixed on the goal.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's it! I'm almost there! And... Yah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now Haru Urara... has finally passed the finish line! A round of
applause for her, folks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dead last... Judging from her form, I know she's not injured or sick.
This really is the best she can do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While disappointed, I can't seem to get the image of Haru Urara
running with all her might out of my mind.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... Wheeze... S-so tired...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah, you're that trainer from before! You really came to watch me run!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... This is embarrassing. I thought I was gonna win for sure this
time...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But guess what?! I ran the whooole race! All that training really paid
off!
choice_data_list: I could tell you ran with everything you've got.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really?! Ehehe, I sure did!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Running really is the best! I can't wait for my next race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah, now that I think about it, I'll be running in the next tryout race
too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you should come watch me race there too! I'll make sure to take
first place then!
choice_data_list: All right. I'll see you there.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Great! Then it's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Anyway, looks like I've got more practice ahead of me! Go, me, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite tasting bitter defeat, Haru Urara's eyes are filled not with
sorrow, but overwhelming determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Facing her relentless optimism, I too am filled with a strong desire to
see her race again.
